rows.description: A Recopia Recipienda a Nov: die 2⁰ 1767.
rows.notes: Page title. The year appears to be '1767', consistent with 18th-century ledgers, although the second digit could be ambiguously a '9'. 'die' for 'dis' is an interpretation based on common Latin ledger phrasing.
